SetPlayerHealth.notes: Must specify which player to set health for; only callable from server context.

GetPlayerHealth.notes: Must specify which player's health to read; only callable from server context.

ApplyPlayerDamage.notes: Damage application must target a specific player and run on server.

RespawnPlayer.notes: Respawns the specified player at their last respawn point.

RespawnPlayerAtTransform.notes: Respawns the specified player at an explicit transform.

DisablePlayer.notes: Enables or disables the specified player; server authority required.

DisablePlayerInput.notes: Locks or unlocks input for the specified player; server authority required.

DisablePlayerDamage.notes: Toggles godmode for the specified player; server authority required.

SetPlayerVehicle.notes: Forces the specified player into or out of a vehicle; server authority required.

GetPlayerVehicle.notes: Returns the vehicle handle the specified player is currently in, or 0 if on foot.

GetPlayerTool.notes: Returns the current tool name for the specified player.

SetPlayerTool.notes: Switches the active tool for the specified player; server authority required.

GetPlayerTransform.notes: Returns the world-space transform of the specified player.

SetPlayerTransform.notes: Teleports the specified player to a world-space transform; server authority required.

GetPlayerPos.notes: Returns the world-space position vector of the specified player.

GetPlayerRigWorldTransform.notes: Returns the rig world-space transform for the specified player.

GetAllPlayers.notes: MP-only. Returns a list of all connected player IDs.

GetLocalPlayer.notes: MP-only. Returns the player ID of the local client.

GetPlayerCount.notes: MP-only. Returns the number of currently connected players.

GetMaxPlayers.notes: MP-only. Returns the maximum player slots for this session.

GetAddedPlayers.notes: MP-only. Returns players who joined since last tick.

GetRemovedPlayers.notes: MP-only. Returns players who left since last tick.

GetPlayerName.notes: MP-only. Returns the display name string for the given player ID.

IsPlayerLocal.notes: MP-only. Returns true if the given player ID represents the local client.

IsPlayerHost.notes: MP-only. Returns true if the given player ID is the session host.

IsPlayerValid.notes: MP-only. Returns true if the given player ID is still connected.

ClientCall.notes: MP-only. Invokes a function on the client side; call from server to send to clients.

ServerCall.notes: MP-only. Invokes a function on the server side; call from client to request server action.

PostEvent.notes: MP-only. Broadcasts an event to all listeners in the current domain.

InputPressed.notes: Returns true on the frame the local player presses the specified action. Client-only.

InputReleased.notes: Returns true on the frame the local player releases the specified action. Client-only.

InputDown.notes: Returns true while the local player holds the specified action. Client-only.

InputValue.notes: Returns the analog value (0.0â€“1.0) for the specified action. Client-only.

UiPush.notes: Pushes a UI transform stack frame. Must be called from client draw callback.

UiPop.notes: Pops a UI transform stack frame. Must be called from client draw callback.

UiTranslate.notes: Translates the UI origin by (x, y) pixels. Must be called from client draw callback.

UiAlign.notes: Sets horizontal and vertical alignment for subsequent UI elements.

UiText.notes: Renders a text string at the current UI origin.

UiFont.notes: Sets the active font for subsequent UiText calls.

UiColor.notes: Sets the active draw color for subsequent UI elements.

UiRect.notes: Draws a filled rectangle of (w x h) pixels at the current UI origin.

UiImage.notes: Draws an image at the current UI origin.

UiCenter.notes: Centers the UI origin horizontally on screen.

UiMiddle.notes: Centers the UI origin vertically on screen.

UiWidth.notes: Sets the layout width constraint for the current UI element.

UiHeight.notes: Sets the layout height constraint for the current UI element.

UiWindow.notes: Draws a titled window panel at the current UI origin.

UiButtonText.notes: Draws a clickable text button and returns true if clicked.

UiSlider.notes: Draws a slider control and returns the current value.

UiWordWrap.notes: Enables word-wrap at the specified pixel width for subsequent UiText calls.

UiTextInput.notes: Draws a text input field and returns whether it has focus.

UiGetTextInput.notes: Returns the current string value of the specified text input field.

UiColorFilter.notes: Applies a multiplicative color filter to all subsequent UI draw calls.

UiImageBox.notes: Draws a 9-slice image box at the current UI origin.

UiBorderImage.notes: Draws a bordered image at the current UI origin.

UiBlur.notes: Applies a blur effect to the UI region behind subsequent elements.

UiGetWidth.notes: Returns the screen width in pixels.

UiGetHeight.notes: Returns the screen height in pixels.

UiScale.notes: Scales subsequent UI draw operations by the given factor.

UiRotate.notes: Rotates the UI canvas by the specified number of degrees.

UiOrder.notes: Sets the draw-order (Z) for the current UI group.

UiCropRect.notes: Clips subsequent UI draw calls to the specified rectangle.

UiMakeInteractive.notes: Marks the current UI element as mouse-interactive.

PlaySound.notes: Plays a one-shot sound at a world position. Client-only; use ServerCall to trigger from server.

PlayLoop.notes: Plays a looping sound at a world position. Client-only.

LoadSound.notes: Pre-loads a sound asset and returns a handle. Client-only.

SpawnParticle.notes: Spawns a particle at a world position. Client-only visual effect.

ParticleReset.notes: Resets particle system parameters to defaults. Client-only.

ParticleType.notes: Sets the particle type for subsequent SpawnParticle calls. Client-only.

ParticleAlpha.notes: Sets the alpha start/end for particles. Client-only.

ParticleRadius.notes: Sets the radius start/end for particles. Client-only.

ParticleColor.notes: Sets the color for particles. Client-only.

ParticleDrag.notes: Sets the drag coefficient for particles. Client-only.

ParticleGravity.notes: Sets the gravity multiplier for particles. Client-only.

ParticleStretch.notes: Sets velocity stretch for particles. Client-only.

ParticleSticky.notes: Sets whether particles stick to surfaces. Client-only.

ParticleCollide.notes: Enables or disables particle collision. Client-only.

ParticleEmissive.notes: Sets the emissive intensity for particles. Client-only.

ParticleTile.notes: Sets the texture tile index for particles. Client-only.

SpawnFire.notes: Spawns a fire effect at the given world position. Client-only visual.

SpawnExplosion.notes: Spawns an explosion visual effect. Client-only; use ServerCall for authoritative physics.

FindBody.notes: Finds and returns the first body matching the given tag.

FindShape.notes: Finds and returns the first shape matching the given tag.

FindJoint.notes: Finds and returns the first joint matching the given tag.

FindLight.notes: Finds and returns the first light matching the given tag.

FindTrigger.notes: Finds and returns the first trigger volume matching the given tag.

FindVehicle.notes: Finds and returns the first vehicle matching the given tag.

GetBodyTransform.notes: Returns the world-space transform of the specified body.

SetBodyTransform.notes: Sets the world-space transform of the specified body. Server-authoritative in MP; call from server.

GetBodyVelocity.notes: Returns the linear velocity vector of the specified body.

SetBodyVelocity.notes: Sets the linear velocity of the specified body. Server-authoritative in MP.

GetBodyAngularVelocity.notes: Returns the angular velocity vector of the specified body.

SetBodyAngularVelocity.notes: Sets the angular velocity of the specified body. Server-authoritative in MP.

IsBodyDynamic.notes: Returns true if the body is dynamic (physics-simulated).

IsBodyActive.notes: Returns true if the body is awake in the physics simulation.

GetShapeWorldTransform.notes: Returns the world-space transform of the specified shape.

GetShapeLocalTransform.notes: Returns the local-space transform of the specified shape relative to its body.

GetShapeBounds.notes: Returns the AABB (min, max) of the specified shape in world space.

GetVehicleTransform.notes: Returns the world-space transform of the specified vehicle.

GetVehicleBody.notes: Returns the body handle for the specified vehicle.

DriveVehicle.notes: Applies driving inputs to the specified vehicle. Call from server for authoritative control.

GetJointType.notes: Returns the type string of the specified joint.

GetJointMovement.notes: Returns the current movement (position or angle) of the specified joint.

GetJointLimits.notes: Returns the min/max movement limits of the specified joint.

SetJointMotor.notes: Sets the motor parameters of the specified joint. Server-authoritative in MP.

SetJointMotorTarget.notes: Sets a positional target for the joint motor. Server-authoritative in MP.

GetLightTransform.notes: Returns the world-space transform of the specified light.

SetLightEnabled.notes: Enables or disables the specified light. Server-authoritative in MP.

GetTriggerTransform.notes: Returns the world-space transform of the specified trigger volume.

IsPointInTrigger.notes: Returns true if the world-space point is inside the trigger volume.

IsTriggerEmpty.notes: Returns true if no bodies are overlapping the trigger volume.

IsBodyInTrigger.notes: Returns true if the specified body overlaps the trigger volume.

QueryRaycast.notes: Casts a ray and returns hit information. Read-only; safe on any domain.

QueryAabbBodies.notes: Returns all bodies overlapping the given AABB. Read-only; safe on any domain.

QueryAabbShapes.notes: Returns all shapes overlapping the given AABB. Read-only; safe on any domain.

QueryClosestPoint.notes: Returns the closest world-geometry point to the given origin. Read-only.

MakeHole.notes: Carves a spherical hole in voxel geometry. Must run on server for authoritative world mutation.

Shoot.notes: Fires projectiles into the world. Server-authoritative for damage; client can use for visual-only.

Paint.notes: Paints voxels with the specified material at the given position. Server-authoritative in MP.

GetCameraTransform.notes: Returns the current camera transform. On client returns local camera; on server returns a default.

SetCameraTransform.notes: Overrides the camera transform. Only meaningful on the client; no-op on server.

SetCameraDof.notes: Sets camera depth-of-field parameters. Client-meaningful only.

GetFireCount.notes: Returns the number of active fire points in the scene.

IsPointAffectedByFire.notes: Returns true if the world-space point is within range of active fire.

SetInt.notes: Stores an integer value in the registry under the given key.

GetInt.notes: Reads an integer from the registry; returns default if key absent.

SetFloat.notes: Stores a float value in the registry under the given key.

GetFloat.notes: Reads a float from the registry; returns default if key absent.

SetBool.notes: Stores a boolean value in the registry under the given key.

GetBool.notes: Reads a boolean from the registry; returns default if key absent.

SetString.notes: Stores a string value in the registry under the given key.

GetString.notes: Reads a string from the registry; returns default if key absent.

HasKey.notes: Returns true if the given key exists in the registry.

ClearKey.notes: Removes the given key from the registry.

ListKeys.notes: Returns a list of all registry keys matching the given prefix.

RegisterTool.notes: Registers a new tool with the game; must be called during init on the server.

GetToolTransform.notes: Returns the world-space transform of the currently equipped tool. Server-only.

SetToolTransform.notes: Overrides the world-space transform of the currently equipped tool. Server-only.

Vec.notes: Constructs a Vec3 value. Pure math utility; safe on any domain.

VecAdd.notes: Returns a + b. Pure math utility.

VecSub.notes: Returns a - b. Pure math utility.

VecScale.notes: Returns v * s. Pure math utility.

VecLength.notes: Returns the magnitude of v. Pure math utility.

VecNormalize.notes: Returns the unit-length direction of v. Pure math utility.

VecDot.notes: Returns the dot product of a and b. Pure math utility.

VecCross.notes: Returns the cross product of a and b. Pure math utility.

VecLerp.notes: Linearly interpolates between a and b by t. Pure math utility.

Quat.notes: Constructs a quaternion. Pure math utility.

QuatEuler.notes: Constructs a quaternion from Euler angles (degrees). Pure math utility.

QuatRotateQuat.notes: Composes two quaternions. Pure math utility.

QuatRotateVec.notes: Rotates vector v by quaternion q. Pure math utility.

QuatLookAt.notes: Returns a quaternion that orients from toward to. Pure math utility.

QuatSlerp.notes: Spherically interpolates between quaternions a and b by t. Pure math utility.

Transform.notes: Constructs a Transform value from position and rotation. Pure math utility.

TransformToParentPoint.notes: Converts a local-space point to the parent (world) space of the transform.

TransformToParentVec.notes: Converts a local-space direction vector to parent space.

TransformToLocalPoint.notes: Converts a world-space point to the local space of the transform.

TransformToLocalVec.notes: Converts a world-space direction vector to the local space of the transform.

GetPlayerVelocity.notes: Returns player velocity vector; needs playerId in MP.

SetPlayerVelocity.notes: Sets player velocity; needs playerId in MP.

GetPlayerCameraTransform.notes: Gets player camera transform; needs playerId in MP.

GetPlayerGrabShape.notes: Gets shape player is grabbing; needs playerId in MP.

GetPlayerGrabBody.notes: Gets body player is grabbing; needs playerId in MP.

GetPlayerInteractShape.notes: Gets shape player is interacting with; needs playerId in MP.

GetPlayerInteractBody.notes: Gets body player is interacting with; needs playerId in MP.

GetPlayerPickShape.notes: Gets shape player is picking; needs playerId in MP.

GetPlayerPickBody.notes: Gets body player is picking; needs playerId in MP.
